evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-22 bounded live official HTML on https://dbhdd.georgia.gov/regional-field-office-county. The county table still renders empty county cells and repeated Region 1-6 links, but the live anchor markup now makes the failure mode explicit: each reviewed region link carries data-status-unpublished="1", data-status-in-trash="1", and aria-label="Not visible to public". That means the current official county page is not exposing a public county-to-region routing contract, and the linked region leaves remain non-public/access-denied. A deterministic 159-county county-to-region map still cannot be verified from the current public official evidence.
